title.en: China Heavyweight Garment Manufacturer | 600 GSM Hoodies & Custom Apparel

subtitle.en: featuring double-needle stitching,providing oversized fit blanks

subtitle.zh: High-quality knit T-shirts and heavyweight sweatshirts
subtitle.en: High-quality knit T-shirts and heavyweight sweatshirts

title.en: China Heavyweight Garment Manufacturer | 600 GSM Hoodies & Custom Apparel

subtitle.en: we specialize in heavyweight knitwear from 400 to 640 GSM, control fabric density, yarn quality, and finishing to ensure durability, structure, and comfort.

content.zh:
Founded in 2023, Kellogg Fashion is a Dongguan-based streetwear clothing manufacturer specializing in heavyweight hoodies, oversized T-shirts, premium fleece garments, and custom streetwear production for global fashion brands. The company focuses on high-quality cut-and-sew apparel for the U.S., UK, Australian, and European markets, with strong expertise in 240–600gsm heavyweight fabrics and modern streetwear silhouettes.//

Kellogg Fashion works closely with emerging streetwear labels, private-label startups, and independent fashion brands, helping clients develop premium-quality collections with flexible MOQs, fast sampling, and stable bulk production. The company’s manufacturing capabilities cover fabric sourcing, pattern development, embroidery, screen printing, puff printing, acid wash, vintage wash, and garment dyeing.//

To ensure product consistency and premium hand-feel, Kellogg Fashion applies strict fabric quality standards, including://

Fabric shrinkage testing //
GSM tolerance inspection //
Color fastness testing //
Wash durability testing //
Fabric composition verification //
Stitching and needle inspection //

The company mainly works with high-quality cotton, French terry, brushed fleece, and heavyweight jersey fabrics designed for luxury streetwear and oversized fashion collections.//

With an efficient sampling and production system, Kellogg Fashion is able to support rapid product development and reliable lead times for both small-batch and scalable production orders. The company’s mission is to help global fashion brands build premium streetwear products with stable quality, trend-driven craftsmanship, and strong fabric expertise.

content.zh:
At Kellogg Fashion, our production line is built specifically for premium streetwear and heavyweight garments. We specialize in sewing oversized hoodies, heavyweight sweatshirts, oversized T-shirts, joggers, and fleece products using high-GSM fabrics ranging from 240gsm to 600gsm.//

Our sewing team is experienced in handling thick cotton, French terry, brushed fleece, and garment-dyed fabrics, ensuring clean construction, strong seam durability, and consistent garment shape after washing. We use professional sewing techniques such as double-needle stitching, coverstitch sewing, reinforced shoulder taping, rib attachment, and flatlock finishing to improve both comfort and long-term wear performance.//

Kellogg Fashion is especially skilled in producing://
Heavyweight hoodies and sweatshirts //
Oversized streetwear silhouettes //
Acid wash and vintage wash garments //
Premium fleece apparel //
Cut-and-sew streetwear collections //

Each production stage is carefully monitored by our QC team to ensure accurate sizing, stable stitching density, fabric consistency, and clean finishing before packing and shipment. Our factory is designed to support both small-batch brand development and scalable bulk production with stable lead times and flexible manufacturing solutions for U.S., UK, Australian, and European fashion brands.

subtitle.en: Feel the beauty of craftsmanship up close

subtitle.zh: 与全球知名品牌携手共进

subtitle.en: Reliable custom hoodie supplier with expertise in 500+ GSM cotton fabrics. We support screen printing, embroidery, and garment washing. Flexible MOQ, stable quality, and fast turnaround for growing fashion brands.

subtitle.zh: 在这里您可以找到常见问题的解答
subtitle.en: FAQ - Find answers to common questions here

question.zh: Q: What products does Kellogg Fashion specialize in?
question.en: Q: What products does Kellogg Fashion specialize in?

answer.zh: A: Kellogg Fashion specializes in heavyweight streetwear apparel, including oversized hoodies, heavyweight sweatshirts, oversized T-shirts, joggers, and premium fleece garments for global fashion brands.
answer.en: A: Kellogg Fashion specializes in heavyweight streetwear apparel, including oversized hoodies, heavyweight sweatshirts, oversized T-shirts, joggers, and premium fleece garments for global fashion brands.

question.zh: Q: What fabric weights do you mainly work with?
question.en: Q: What fabric weights do you mainly work with?

answer.zh: A: We mainly work with 240gsm–600gsm fabrics, including heavyweight cotton jersey, French terry, brushed fleece, and custom-developed streetwear fabrics.
answer.en: A: We mainly work with 240gsm–600gsm fabrics, including heavyweight cotton jersey, French terry, brushed fleece, and custom-developed streetwear fabrics.

question.zh: Q: Do you support custom designs and private label production?
question.en: Q: Do you support custom designs and private label production?

answer.zh: Yes. We provide full OEM & ODM services, including custom patterns, sizing, fabric sourcing, embroidery, screen printing, puff printing, washing effects, woven labels, hang tags, and packaging.
answer.en: Yes. We provide full OEM & ODM services, including custom patterns, sizing, fabric sourcing, embroidery, screen printing, puff printing, washing effects, woven labels, hang tags, and packaging.

question.zh: Q: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
question.en: Q: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?

answer.zh: A: Our MOQ depends on the product type and fabric requirements. For most custom streetwear styles, we offer flexible MOQs suitable for startup brands and growing fashion labels.
answer.en: A: Our MOQ depends on the product type and fabric requirements. For most custom streetwear styles, we offer flexible MOQs suitable for startup brands and growing fashion labels.

question.zh: Q: Can you help develop samples before bulk production?
question.en: Q: Can you help develop samples before bulk production?

answer.zh: A: Yes. We support complete sample development, including fabric matching, fit adjustment, print testing, and wash effect confirmation before mass production.
answer.en: A: Yes. We support complete sample development, including fabric matching, fit adjustment, print testing, and wash effect confirmation before mass production.

question.zh: Q: How do you control product quality?
question.en: Q: How do you control product quality?

answer.zh: We apply strict quality control during every production stage, including fabric inspection, shrinkage testing, stitching inspection, measurement checking, color fastness testing, and final garment inspection before shipment.
answer.en: We apply strict quality control during every production stage, including fabric inspection, shrinkage testing, stitching inspection, measurement checking, color fastness testing, and final garment inspection before shipment.

question.zh: Q: What printing and washing techniques do you offer?
question.en: Q: What printing and washing techniques do you offer?

answer.zh: A: We offer screen printing, puff printing, DTG printing, embroidery, acid wash, vintage wash, garment dyeing, enzyme wash, and other premium streetwear finishing techniques.
answer.en: A: We offer screen printing, puff printing, DTG printing, embroidery, acid wash, vintage wash, garment dyeing, enzyme wash, and other premium streetwear finishing techniques.

question.zh: Q: What are your typical production lead times?
question.en: Q: What are your typical production lead times?

answer.zh: A: Sample production usually takes 7–14 days, while bulk production generally takes 20–35 days depending on order quantity, fabric availability, and customization requirements.
answer.en: A: Sample production usually takes 7–14 days, while bulk production generally takes 20–35 days depending on order quantity, fabric availability, and customization requirements.

question.zh: Q: Which markets do you mainly work with?
question.en: Q: Which markets do you mainly work with?

answer.zh: A: We mainly work with fashion brands and buyers from the United States, United Kingdom, Australia, Canada, and Europe, especially independent streetwear and contemporary fashion brands.
answer.en: A: We mainly work with fashion brands and buyers from the United States, United Kingdom, Australia, Canada, and Europe, especially independent streetwear and contemporary fashion brands.

question.zh: Q: Why do brands choose Kellogg Fashion?
question.en: Q: Why do brands choose Kellogg Fashion?

answer.zh: A: Brands choose Kellogg Fashion because of our expertise in heavyweight fabrics, oversized streetwear construction, flexible production solutions, stable quality control, and deep understanding of modern streetwear trends and garment craftsmanship.
answer.en: A: Brands choose Kellogg Fashion because of our expertise in heavyweight fabrics, oversized streetwear construction, flexible production solutions, stable quality control, and deep understanding of modern streetwear trends and garment craftsmanship.
